title: Why FIRS, SystemSpecs partner to simplify tax remittances
description: To further simplify tax remittances, SystemSpecs has collaborated with the Federal Inland Revenue Service (FIRS). This deal is also aimed at strengthening tax administration through its Remita Payment
html:
To further simplify tax remittances, SystemSpecs has collaborated with the Federal Inland Revenue Service (FIRS). This deal is also aimed at strengthening tax administration through its Remita Payment Gateway, which powers payments on TaxPro-Max, a new solution for filing tax returns.

The platform for private sector and government payments has been integrated with the e-filling platform to automate tax filing, enable easy registration, ease tax payments as well as provide a single-view of transaction records.

Tax Payers can register online or through a visit to the FIRS tax office to get on boarded on TaxPro Max. The deal is expected to promote digitalisation of tax administration in Nigeria.

Divisional Head, Business Development, SystemSpecs, Abayomi Oniku, noted that in fulfilling the organisation’s brand promise, the Remita Payment Gateway will continue to meet the needs of individuals, businesses and governments.

“In furtherance of our support for various sectors of the Nigerian economy, we have now also advanced our brand proposition to ensure that tax payment is faster, more convenient and efficient. Our latest partnership with the FIRS is geared towards helping individuals, corporate organisations and government agencies enjoy a convenient process of paying their taxes, anywhere and at any time to facilitate compliance.”
